insight: Lang values are cached as legacy §-strings at load (Lang.legacyCache) then re-parsed as MiniMessage when sent via CommonCore.tell, which breaks `<reset>`/`</bold>` boundaries and leaks bold past resets. Workarounds like `&r` or `<reset>` ride the same broken path; proper fix is to send lang as components (Lang.component + sendMessage) instead of Lang.legacy + tell.
